response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~13 years of professional experience and broad polyglot skills, but the role demands a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. There is no evidence of AI/ML platform work, large-scale strategic influence, executive advisory experience, or shipped AI products, which are central to this Principal-level AI strategy position.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive via founding GISCollective and building open-source tooling/frameworks
Public technical contributions: conference talks, workshops, and OSS libraries showing communication ability
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products/platforms — core requirement of the role
Experience level (~13 yrs, Senior/Staff) is below the Director-level IC / 15-year Principal bar
No evidence of advising strategic customers, cloud platform strategy, or org-wide technical leadership

key_factors.factor: Seniority and strategic leadership gap vs Principal/Director IC bar
Entrepreneurial OSS founding and polyglot engineering breadth
